ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel being monitored */,
  "hit_rate" REAL /* Hit rate of the channel */,
  "total_req" REAL /* Total number of requests */,
  "read_req" REAL /* Number of read requests */,
  "write_req" REAL /* Number of write requests */,
  "atomic_req" INTEGER /* Number of atomic requests */,
  "ea_read_req" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) read requests */,
  "ea_write_req" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) write requests */,
  "ea_atomic_req" INTEGER /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) atomic requests */,
  "ea_read_latency_cycles" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) read latency in cycles */,
  "ea_write_latency_cycles" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) write latency in cycles */,
  "ea_atomic_latency_cycles" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) atomic latency in cycles */,
  "ea_read_stall_io" INTEGER /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) read stall due to IO */,
  "ea_read_stall_gmi" INTEGER /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) read stall due to GMI */,
  "ea_read_stall_dram" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) read stall due to DRAM */,
  "ea_write_stall_io" INTEGER /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) write stall due to IO */,
  "ea_write_stall_gmi" INTEGER /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) write stall due to GMI */,
  "ea_write_stall_dram" REAL /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) write stall due to DRAM */,
  "ea_write_stall_starve" INTEGER /* Enhanced accuracy (EA) write stall due to starve */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was collected */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system component */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors or failures */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput rate */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "network_bandwidth" REAL /* Network bandwidth usage */,
  "storage_utilization" REAL /* Storage utilization percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the system component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the system component (e.g., server, storage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the component */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_channels" (
  "component_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-channel mapping */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system component */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mapping */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mapping (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_channels_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_channels_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system component */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source of the log */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the destination of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system component */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source of the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
